name: sbx
description: Self-hostable sandbox infrastructure for AI agents. Run many isolated, observable sandboxes on your own hardware.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sbx/sdk && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check:agent: npm run build --workspace @sbx/daemon && (cd agent && go build -o /tmp/sbx-agent-darwin ./cmd/sbx-agent) && node packages/daemon/dist/agent-check.js
scripts.check:applevz: npm run build:vz && npm run build --workspace @sbx/daemon && node packages/daemon/dist/applevz-check.js
scripts.build:vz: cd helpers/sbx-vz && swift build -c release && mkdir -p dist && cp .build/release/sbx-vz dist/sbx-vz && codesign --sign - --entitlements sbx-vz.entitlements --force dist/sbx-vz && echo 'signed dist/sbx-vz'
scripts.build:agent: cd agent && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/sbx-agent-linux-arm64 ./cmd/sbx-agent && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/sbx-agent-linux-amd64 ./cmd/sbx-agent
